title: J. SCHNEEBERGER Maschinen AG ransomware incident

extortion.description: J. SCHNEEBERGER Maschinen AG develops and produces the most modern CNC grinding machines for the manufacturing and re-grinding of cutting tools and the production of a variety of precision parts.We are going to upload more than 30 GB of corporate documents such as: passports and identity cards of employees, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), corporate NDA’s and confidentiality agreements, etc.
